name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch - Lamb & Liver Chunks in Jelly 100g
shortDescription: Crafted by expert nutritionists, Reflex Plus Chicken Canned Food offers a complete meal made with tender chicken to enhance muscle health, energy, and overall wellbeing.
description: Reflex Plus Lamb & Liver Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Pouch , fully-balanced, lamb and liver protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.0 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 0.3 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese - 100 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (lamb 5% min., liver 4% min.), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
